contexts.context: ...quite sure whether, at one moment, he was <mark>treating</mark> us to a bit of traditional stage business....
...:  "What did you say to them?  I was <mark>treated</mark> like royalty."   For the record, the hospital...
...no harm, and,after they'd gone,for days you would <mark>treat</mark> us to the sulks. But when in good...
